_comment: Privy wallet policy — paste this in Privy Dashboard → Wallet infrastructure → Policies.
Attach it to the authorization key / key quorum used by PRIVY_WALLET_API_AUTHORIZATION_PRIVATE_KEY.
• Transactions must target known 0x / Odos routers — no arbitrary contract calls
• No plain native ETH sends (calldata required)
• USD notional spend cap per transaction (~$500 equiv — adjust as needed)
name: liquid-launcher-base-swaps

rules.name: base-mainnet-only
rules.description: Restrict all transactions to Base mainnet (chain id 8453)

rules.name: approved-routers-only
rules.description: Only allow calls to known 0x / Odos routers on Base. Deny everything else.

rules.name: no-native-sends
rules.description: Block plain ETH transfers (no calldata). Swaps always have calldata.

rules.name: spend-cap-per-tx
rules.description: Cap the ETH value per transaction. ~0.15 ETH ≈ $500 at $3300/ETH — adjust to match BOT_SWAP_MAX_ETH.
